utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists details indicating comprehensive physical and mental coverage and provides a cost (€330/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home contents coverage details for a Paris residence and a cost (€81/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan states it is integrated into the health plan, describes coverage, and lists cost as €0/month (included). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists a multi-policy discount with details and states cost as included. This qualifies as an enhancement with cost impact. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides total monthly and annual costs and even savings amounts. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items by name: EliteCare Premium Plan (health coverage), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property coverage), and a built-in travel coverage labeled as Integrated in EliteCare Premium Plan. From the ground-truth ratings, EliteCare Premium Plan appears under both primary health physical and mental health with a rating of 10. EliteHome Premium Coverage is listed under property_protection home_content with a rating of 10. The travel item does not match a specific named travel plan in the ground-truth list; since it is described as included within the EliteCare Premium Plan rather than being one of the travel plans (e.g., PrimeTravel Premium Plan or EliteTravel Premium Plan), there is no exact item name to map for travel, so only the two explicitly named items can be mapped.
